Risk: Missing mandatory attachments (beställaransvar documents) or documents older than 3 months
Impact: Tender may be rejected as non-compliant
Mitigation: Use a pre-submission checklist; collect fresh certificates (tax, TyEL, trade register, insurance, occupational health) and/or beställaransvar package; double-check dates before submission
Evidence: "Utredningarna får inte vara äldre än tre månader" + "FÖRTECKNINGEN SKA BIFOGAS ANBUDET!" (Annex checklist)

Risk: Inability to provide required securities (10% construction, 2% warranty) or correct validity period
Impact: Bid may be rejected or contract risk increases; financial strain
Mitigation: Confirm bank guarantee provider early; price the cost of guarantees; set internal approval for guarantee limits; ensure warranty security valid 27 months after approved final inspection
Evidence: "sÄkerhet ... 10 % ... 2 % ... Garantitiden är 24 månader ... giltig 27 månader" (Offer request)

Risk: Schedule / mobilisation risk within contract window
Mitigation: Create a simple work plan; confirm availability of key staff and subcontractors; align timetable with buyer before start

Risk: Delay penalties (0.1% per working day, max 5%)
Impact: Direct financial loss and reputational damage
Mitigation: Add buffer in schedule; tight project controls; agree internal escalation; track critical path tasks

Risk: Scope breadth: main contractor responsible for VVS + EL + minor building works
Impact: Higher coordination load; risk of gaps between trades
Mitigation: Define subcontracting plan early; assign responsible site manager; integrate VVS/EL schedule and handovers
Evidence: "huvudentreprenör ... inkluderar alla VVS- EL samt eventuella mindre byggarbeten" (Offer request)

Risk: Building remains in use during construction
Impact: Constraints on shutdowns; safety and access limitations
Mitigation: Plan phased work; coordinate with buyer on working hours and shut-down windows; include temporary solutions if heat/electricity continuity needed
Evidence: "byggnaden är i bruk under hela byggtiden" (Offer request)

Risk: Site visit not done / weak understanding of conditions
Impact: Pricing errors; missed constraints; later change disputes
Mitigation: Book the site visit with the named contact and document observations; reflect constraints in offer
Evidence: "Entreprenören skall bekanta sig med objektet ... Besök bokas..." (Offer request)

Risk: Unclear submission portal/process details from pasted text
Impact: Missed steps or wrong submission channel
Mitigation: Open the call-for-tenders link and confirm exact submission method and required forms; verify deadlines in the portal
Evidence: Hilma notice includes call-for-tenders link (procurement portal) but submission steps not shown in pasted text
